title: chatta'ah #2403
definition:
1) sin, sinful
 2) sin, sin offering
    2a) sin
    2b) condition of sin, guilt of sin
    2c) punishment for sin
    2d) sin-offering
    2e) purification from sins of ceremonial uncleanness
nasbUsage:

 2) sin, sin offering

    NASB:  sinful thing, sin
